meta.title: Frutero Club — For companies
meta.description: We build product, run hackathons, and connect you with verifiable LatAm talent. Work with the Frutero Club builder community.

hero.title: Build with the community
hero.lead: Frutero Club is a community of teams that already ship product, run hackathons, and train builders across LatAm. Now you can also tap into their verifiable talent.
hero.cardBody: It's not a job board. It's a community where every builder's work lives on their perfil — verifiable, and theirs.

build.title: Product building
build.body: We design and ship product with you: prototype to production, with builders who have done it before.

hackathons.title: Hackathons & programs
hackathons.body: We run hackathons, bootcamps, and challenges for your brand. Logistics, mentorship, and a community ready to show up.

talent.title: Verifiable talent
talent.body: Every builder has a perfil with proven work. You reach people whose reputation can be checked — not just a résumé.

talent.heading: Hire verifiable talent
talent.lead: We find the best matches between your team and builders whose reputation is backed by their work, not by a PDF.
talent.body: Recruiting is bespoke: tell us what you need and we connect you with people who have already proven what they can do inside the community.

contact.heading: Let's talk
contact.lead: Tell us what you want to build or who you're looking for. We'll get back to you shortly.

success.title: Message received!
success.body: Thanks for reaching out. We'll be in touch soon.

errors.rateLimited: Too many submissions. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: We couldn't send your message. Please try again.
